plan.description: A script that calculates the factorial of a non-negative integer provided by the user.

files.purpose: Contains the main logic for calculating the factorial using a loop or recursion.

build_steps: Run the script directly via the Python interpreter.

subtasks.name: Implement Factorial Logic
subtasks.description: Write the function to calculate the factorial (n!). The function must handle non-negative integers and include error handling for negative inputs.

subtasks.name: Create CLI Interface
subtasks.description: Add input handling to prompt the user for a number and display the result.
